name: Shadow Stalkers
background:
Shadow Stalkers are elusive and alien creatures from another plane, which appear strange and unsettling to most Tyrians. Their bizarre and uncanny armies strike terror into the heart of any who dare to face them. 

The Shadow Stalkers were brought to Tyria through a flaw in their Voidgates, which left permanent scars throughout their home plane. Desperate to save their home, these mysterious entities ventured through the Voidgates to Tyria, shutting off their only path of return. Now, they are trapped in an unfamiliar plane, uncertain if their sacrifice was enough to save their home.
backgroundFull:
Shadow Stalkers lived in relative harmony in their strange, lightless plane, known to them as the Labyrinth. They dwelt in cities scattered among the ancient winding paths, using their plane’s ambient magical aura to navigate in the darkness. This changed when the Voidgates began to appear in their plane. 

The Voidgates interfered with the Labyrinth’s magic. The fungi and mosses near the newly opened gates withered and animals shunned them. Shadow Stalkers who lingered close to these Voidgates too long became weak and ill. Soon it was discovered that the magic permeating the Labyrinth was slowly draining life from the Plane through the gate and unless action was taken, their home would become uninhabitable.

The Shadow Stalkers began to investigate the other side of the Voidgate. Near the Voidgates, there were traces of the Labyrinth’s magic, manifesting as a faint miasma which allowed them to sense their surroundings. As they moved further, however, they discovered that magic in Tyria operated very differently than in the Labyrinth. Rather than permeating the plane like air, magical power in Tyria was far more concentrated, and magic users were like bright lights in total darkness. They were able to detect these magic users opening new Voidgates throughout their plane, heedless of the damage their spells caused. 

On discovering the cause of the disturbance in their Plane, the Shadow Stalkers sought out volunteers to explore the plane of Tyria and shut the gates. They prepared relics that would allow them to sense things in Tyria, projecting their own magical auras which they could use to sense things. Soon, they were ready and began to pour out through Voidgates, destroying the gates behind them. 

They surged through the old Ogre Kingdoms, sealing any Voidgates they found which might connect to their world. The destruction of these gates left the Shadow Stalkers with no way of returning home, and they were now trapped in Tyria. Some Shadow Stalkers hid in the ruins of the cities which they seized, slowly learning to adapt to the new plane, some pursued the Ogres and their Shamans hoping to prevent them from opening new gates, while others sought a way to return home. 

How will you navigate this strange plane?

spells.name: Labyrinthian Sparkle
spells.effect: Pick one friendly unit within 12", which gets Evasive once (next time the effect would apply).

parameters.name: effectDuration
parameters.value: once (next time the effect would apply)

costFormula.value: { name: params.effect.unitRule.name, rating: params.effect.unitRule.rating, multiplier: params.multiplier * (params.aura ? this.AuraSize : 1), avgUnit: !params.thisUnit }

effectDuration.name: once (next time the effect would apply)

spells.effectSkirmish: Pick one friendly unit within 12", which gets Evasive once (next time the effect would apply).

spells.name: Maze Vines
spells.effect: Pick one enemy unit within 12", which takes 2 hits with AP(1) and Fragment.
spells.effectSkirmish: Pick one enemy unit within 12", which takes 2 hits with AP(1) and Fragment.

spells.name: Dream Haunter
spells.effect: Pick up to two enemy units within 18", which friendly units gets Unpredictable Fighter against once (next time the effect would apply).

parameters.name: effectDuration
parameters.value: once (next time the effect would apply)

costFormula.value: { name: params.effect.unitRule.name, rating: params.effect.unitRule.rating, multiplier: params.multiplier * (this._skirmish ? 1 : this.AuraSize), avgUnit: true }

effectDuration.name: once (next time the effect would apply)

spells.effectSkirmish: Pick up to two enemy units within 18", which friendly units gets Unpredictable Fighter against once (next time the effect would apply).

spells.name: Chill of Death
spells.effect: Pick up to two enemy units within 12", which takes 3 hits.
spells.effectSkirmish: Pick up to two enemy units within 12", which takes 3 hits.

spells.name: Combat Possession
spells.effect: Pick up to three friendly units within 12", which moves +2" when using Advance actions and +4" when using Rush/Charge actions once (next time the effect would apply).

parameters.name: effectDuration
parameters.value: once (next time the effect would apply)

costFormula.value: params.thisUnit ? this.getSpeed(unit, { advance: params.effect.advanceSpeed.value, rush: params.effect.rushSpeed.value }) : 0

effectDuration.name: once (next time the effect would apply)

costFormula.value: params.thisUnit ? 0 : this.getSpeed(this.AverageUnit, { advance: params.effect.advanceSpeed.value, rush: params.effect.rushSpeed.value })

effectDuration.name: once (next time the effect would apply)

spells.effectSkirmish: Pick up to three friendly units within 12", which moves +2" when using Advance actions and +4" when using Rush/Charge actions once (next time the effect would apply).

spells.name: Spectral Light
spells.effect: Pick up to three enemy units within 6", which takes 1 hits with AP(2) and Deadly(3).
spells.effectSkirmish: Pick up to three enemy units within 6", which takes 1 hits with AP(2) and Deadly(3).

specialRules.name: Fortified
specialRules.description: When units where all models have this rule take hits, those hits count as having AP(-1), to a min. of AP(0).

specialRules.name: Sergeant
specialRules.description: When this model attacks, unmodified results of 6 to hit deal 1 extra hit (only the original hit counts as a 6 for special rules).

specialRules.name: Breath Attack
specialRules.description: Once per activation, before attacking, roll one die. On a 2+ one enemy unit within 6" in line of sight takes 1 hit with Blast(3) and AP(1).

specialRules.name: Shadowborn Boost
specialRules.description: If all models in this unit have Shadowborn, enemies get -8" range when shooting  them and -4" movement when charging them from Shadowborn (instead of only -4" and -2").

specialRules.name: Unique
specialRules.description: This unit may only be taken once per army.

specialRules.name: Armor
specialRules.description: Counts as having Defense X+.

specialRules.name: Precision Target
specialRules.description: Once per game, during this model's activation, pick one enemy unit within 36" and in line of sight of it, and place X markers on it. Friendly units get +X to hit rolls when attacking it.

specialRules.name: Repel Ambushers
specialRules.description: Enemy units using Ambush must be set up over 12" away from this model's unit.

specialRules.name: Ethereal
specialRules.description: Once per activation, before attacking, place this model anywhere fully within 6" of its position. This model moves -6" when using Advance, and -6” when using Rush/Charge.

specialRules.name: Melee Slayer
specialRules.description: This model's melee weapons get AP(+2) against units where most models have Tough(12) or higher.

specialRules.name: Thrust in Melee Aura
specialRules.description: This model and up to 3 nearest friendly units picked before the start of the game get Thrust in melee. If this model is killed, picked models that are deployed lose the rule.

specialRules.name: Melee Evasion
specialRules.description: Enemies get -1 to hit rolls in melee when attacking units where all models have this rule.

specialRules.name: Shadowborn
specialRules.description: Enemies get -4" range when trying to shoot at units where all models have this rule, and -2" movement when trying to charge units where all models have this rule.

specialRules.name: Ravage
specialRules.description: When this model attacks in melee, roll X dice. For each 6+ the target takes one wound.

specialRules.name: Increased Shooting Range Aura
specialRules.description: This model and up to 3 nearest friendly units picked before the start of the game get +6" range when shooting. If this model is killed, picked models that are deployed lose the rule.

specialRules.name: Counter-Attack Aura
specialRules.description: This model and up to 3 nearest friendly units picked before the start of the game get Counter-Attack. If this model is killed, picked models that are deployed lose the rule.

specialRules.name: Rapid Rush Aura
specialRules.description: This model and up to 3 nearest friendly units picked before the start of the game get Rapid Rush. If this model is killed, picked models that are deployed lose the rule.

specialRules.name: Bane in Melee
specialRules.description: This model gets Bane in melee.

specialRules.name: Shadowborn Boost Aura
specialRules.description: This model and up to 3 nearest friendly units picked before the start of the game get Shadowborn Boost. If this model is killed, picked models that are deployed lose the rule.

specialRules.name: Unpredictable Fighter Mark
specialRules.description: Once per activation, before attacking, pick up to 4 enemy units within 18", which friendly units gets Unpredictable Fighter against once (next time the effect would apply).

specialRules.name: Resistance
specialRules.description: When a unit where all models have this rule takes wounds, roll one die for each. On a 6+ it is ignored. If the wounds were from a spell, then they are ignored on a 2+ instead.

specialRules.name: Good Fighter
specialRules.description: This model gets +1 to hit rolls in melee.

specialRules.name: Fragment
specialRules.description: Ignores Cover, and against units where most models have Defense 2+ to Defense 4+, this weapon gets AP(+1).

specialRules.name: AP
specialRules.description: Targets get -X to Defense rolls when blocking hits.

specialRules.name: Blast
specialRules.description: Ignores cover, and after resolving other special rules, each hit is multiplied by X, where X is up to as many hits as enemy models in the target unit and within 3” of it. Hits must be split evenly between all enemy units within 3” of any model from the target (players pick how).

specialRules.name: Defense
specialRules.description: This model gets +X to defense rolls.

specialRules.name: Ambush
specialRules.description: Only deploys D3 rounds afters its wave is deployed, and at the start of the round it's placed at the centre of a random table quarter.

specialRules.name: Tough
specialRules.description: Once a model has taken as many wounds as its Tough value, it is killed (remove from play).

specialRules.name: Thrust
specialRules.description: When charging, gets +1 to hit rolls and AP(+1) in melee.

specialRules.name: Counter-Attack
specialRules.description: Strikes first when charged.

specialRules.name: Counter
specialRules.description: Strikes first with this weapon when charged, and the charging unit gets -1 total Impact rolls per model with Counter.

specialRules.name: Rapid Rush
specialRules.description: This model moves +6" when using Rush actions.

specialRules.name: Bane
specialRules.description: Ignores Regeneration, and when attacking the target must re-roll unmodified Defense results of 6.

specialRules.name: Unpredictable Fighter
specialRules.description: When in melee, roll one die and apply one effect to all models with this rule: on a 1-3 they get AP(+1), and on a 4-6 they get +1 to hit rolls instead.

specialRules.name: Unpredictable
specialRules.description: When attacking, roll one die and apply one effect to all models with this rule: on a 1-3 they get AP(+1), and on a 4-6 they get +1 to hit rolls instead.

specialRules.name: Ignores Cover
specialRules.description: This weapon ignores cover.

specialRules.name: Deadly
specialRules.description: Assign each wound to one model, and multiply it by X. Hits from Deadly must be resolved first, and these wounds don’t carry over to other models if the original target is killed.

specialRules.name: Evasive
specialRules.description: Enemies get -1 to hit rolls when attacking units where all models have this rule.
